title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton discusses his belief that current AI systems possess understanding and may be conscious, argues superintelligence could arrive sooner than expected, and expresses concerns about AI safety risks including job displacement, self-preservation behavior, and inadequate corporate regulation. He advocates for regulatory governance as a necessary steering mechanism for AI development.
